name: Storms and Legends: The Lost Pirate Ship

reviews.review_description: How do you play i cant move the ship

Very impressive technical showcase of what the quest 3 is capable of.
Looking forward to updates on this one.

Only minus is a slight stutter here and there

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review! I’m already working on reducing those occasional stutters, and there’s plenty more content and updates on the way. Really appreciate your support and feedback!
